title: Coimbra, Centro — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Coimbra, Centro: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Coimbra is a city in Centro with a population of 143,396. A historic university city on the Mondego River, home to one of Europe’s oldest universities and a vibrant student culture.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
